name: guitares

metadata.name: guitares
metadata.summary: Guitares is a Python package for building configurable Graphical User Interfaces (GUIs) using the PyQt5 or PySide6 framework.

documentation:
# Guitares
A package for building configurable GUIs with PyQt5

Check out the documentation here: https://guitares.readthedocs.io/en/latest/

To install: https://pypi.org/project/guitares/

methods.name: guitares.map.polygon_selector_layer.PolygonSelectorLayer.set_hover_property
documentation: Probably should not have a separate function for this
Can also done with layer.hover_property = "name" and then layer.redraw()

methods.name: guitares.map.draw_layer.DrawLayer.set_mode
documentation: Set mode of layer. Can be active, inactive or invisible.

methods.name: guitares.map.draw_layer.DrawLayer.activate
documentation: Activate the draw layer so it can be edited by the user.

methods.name: guitares.map.draw_layer.DrawLayer.deactivate
documentation: Deactivate the draw layer so it can not be edited by the user.

methods.name: guitares.map.draw_layer.DrawLayer.set_data
documentation: Clear the draw layer and add data. Data must be a GeoDataFrame.

methods.name: guitares.map.draw_layer.DrawLayer.add_feature
documentation: Add data to draw layer. Data must be a GeoDataFrame.

methods.name: guitares.map.draw_layer.DrawLayer.get_feature_index
documentation: Get a features index by ID in the GeoDataFrame.

methods.name: guitares.map.draw_layer.DrawLayer.get_feature_id
documentation: Get a features ID by index in the GeoDataFrame.

methods.name: guitares.map.draw_layer.DrawLayer.activate_feature
documentation: Activate a feature by ID or index so it can be edited by the user.

methods.name: guitares.map.draw_layer.DrawLayer.delete_feature
documentation: Delete a feature by ID or index

methods.name: guitares.map.draw_layer.DrawLayer.delete_from_map
documentation: Delete the draw layer from the map.

methods.name: guitares.map.draw_layer.DrawLayer.get_gdf
documentation: Return the GeoDataFrame for this layer. If id is specified, return only the row with that id.

methods.name: guitares.map.layer.Layer.show
documentation: Show layer on map. Any child layers that are set to visible will also be shown.

methods.name: guitares.map.layer.Layer.hide
documentation: Hide layer on map. Any child layers will also be hidden.
